## Meeting Purpose

[Interview with Maryna Kravets for Account Strategist role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Maryna has 5 years of customer success experience, currently managing $1.7M ARR and 50 mid-market/enterprise clients at LearnUpon (LMS platform)](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [She emphasizes strategic advising, data-driven decision making, and cross-functional collaboration to drive results (e.g. 8% NRR increase, 40% completion rate boost)](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Maryna is passionate about AI, actively using it to improve workflows and eager to further integrate it into customer success processes](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview

  - [Account Strategist leads strategic direction for clients' content/SEO/AI search presence](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Sets long-term partnership roadmap, works with managing editors and content managers](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [Services-focused role delivering on marketing strategy and execution against client goals](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)

### Candidate Background

  - [5 years in customer success across various industries (automotive, healthcare, MarTech, FinTech)](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=290.0)
  - [Currently manages $1.7M ARR, 50 mid-market/enterprise clients at LearnUpon (LMS platform)](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Emphasizes being a strategic advisor, focusing on customer results and measurable outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Uses "six why" framework to dig deep into customer challenges and identify root causes](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=387.0)

### Cross-Functional Project Example

  - [Identified common features among top-performing customers during onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)
  - [Collaborated with product and marketing teams to create company-wide workflow and automated alerts](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
  - [Resulted in 8% NRR increase (102% to 110%) over 6 months after implementation](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=1060.0)

### Client Turnaround Example

  - [Large fintech client threatening to leave due to UI complaints](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=1132.0)
  - [Uncovered real issue: inability to prove LMS effectiveness to compliance team](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Worked with product/engineering to create tailored reports and compliance framework](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Result: 3-year contract renewal, 10% annual NRR increase, client became platform advocate](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### AI Usage in Workflows

  - [Uses AI (Claude/ChatGPT) to efficiently create strategic results frameworks from call recordings](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Led product webinars on AI capabilities for admins unfamiliar with the technology](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Crafts targeted messaging for overdue invoices using AI, resulting in improved collections](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [Personal use: daily learning sessions, self-reflection tool](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)

### growthx.ai Operations Challenges

  - [Constant need to reinvent strategies and expand offerings to maintain client growth](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Managing scope creep while limiting service delivery as a services company](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=1754.0)
  - [Balancing experimentation/idea validation with efficient scaling of processes](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Primary focus: Delivery against scope of work/contract](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=1835.0)
  - [Ability to pivot if initial approach isn't performing](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=1848.0)
  - [Ensuring scalability of processes to improve efficiency as company grows](https://fathom.video/share/s8EscUgodyadxs2xJEPsKxB-inCsn512?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)

## Next Steps

  - Andi to review Maryna's qualifications and interview responses
  - Determine if Maryna aligns with desired traits: strategic direction setting, data-driven insights, curiosity
  - Consider Maryna's enthusiasm for AI integration and scaling processes
  - Evaluate fit for potential ownership of expansion opportunities within the Account Strategist role
